reviews.review_description:
I like everything about it, especially the landing simulator, but I have an issue where the landing controls are bonded to the thumb stick, and not the left hand controller.  I keep trying to switch the setting it didn't work.  I even tried redownloading the app and it still didn't work.  

Aside from that it's well worth the price if you're interested in this sort of thing.

reviews.review_title: Needs a patch fix to repair this game.
reviews.review_description:
I love anything to do with the Space Shuttle. However, I don’t usually like to compare between platforms but I have this on another platform and it is much better and for the same price.

The detail of the inside of the Space Shuttle between the two platforms are identical. No realism whatsoever, really poor quality detail.

You also get the same landing sims. Although, the Meta version is more smoother and better to control.

Here’s the differences.

In the Meta version, you get a tour of the Space Shuttle but not any missions.
In my other platform, you don’t get the Space Shuttle tour but you do get a couple of missions.
These are: Operating the Canada Arm by moving objects and the main large mission, is capturing the Hubble Space Telescope and replacing the defective parts (WifPic Camera, gyros etc) that made the real Hubble blurred.

The majority of us are using the Meta 3 headset now, so graphics and memory shouldn’t be an issue. So, If you could add these missions to this app, pretty sure the Star rating would soar a lot higher. So, maybe you could implement this in a future update? I won’t hold my breath though!

Piloting the Shuttle to its Landing Site is really good and I like the idea of how to control the pitch, roll and yaw compared to the other Platform.

The library of images shown from the Hubble Telescope, are the same in both platforms. However, after watching once but then return a couple of days later, it no longer shows you the Hubble images. Instead it takes you to a Landing Simulator to land the Shuttle at KSC in cloudy conditions. I’ve uninstalled and reinstalled but the Hubble images section has completely disappeared and there is no cache to clear, in case it’s frozen in memory.

An issue on playback of your landing mission. The Shuttle only has one wheel on its nose gear and it’s a double wheel strut. Did it fall off when extending the gear to land?

One other minor bug in the “Lift Off” section. The compass on both Commander and Pilot’s panel are reversed - Thus W—E should be E—W with the N being reversed as well.

Unable to apply for refund, as I’ve had the game for well over 2hrs but it’s fairly obvious that the Devs do not read these reviews, to either workout a patch, or at the very least, reply to you. They’ve had your money. So, you either have to live with the defects of this Simulator or uninstall it at your loss.

Original review written several weeks ago but adding defects to the list, that I’m slowly coming across.

reviews.review_title: You will regret buying this later
reviews.review_description: This form of game sucks. You don’t assist the takeoff, and it’s practically impossible to land! So DO NOT. BUY THIS GAME? It SUCKS.
The cockpit view is good it’s just that there’s no missions
I'm not getting any of the missions. I'm only getting the launch and landing missions.
Not good no interaction with equipment and it looked very out dated not 10.00

Many people think this is a game, whereas it is actually a fabulous info 3D interactive presentation of learning!!  Do you have any idea how much time and effort it takes to produce something like this for people to experience what we never ever actually could normally?
At USD 9.95 I actually think this is a gift!
Too many grifters in this world want something for nothing these days....
Brilliant

reviews.review_title: Need a refund. It was cool but..
reviews.review_description: Really no content.. its really nothing..maybe cool in a museum but that's it

reviews.review_title: Great for space and aviation geeks!
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this experience. When I clicked on the launch I had no idea how immersive it was going to be. I was in awe and still am. The landing sim is great and I do wish we could actually use our hands to push the buttons needed. Maybe a launch simulator? It just shows that a simulator can happen on a Quest so I thank you for proving this. I’m so excited for more simulators to come out. Could you make the scenery better for the launch experience better? I’d love to see earth and more realistic stars. But thank you so much for this! I absolutely love it.
I a cheap uninteractive game

I am rating this on behalf of the one star rating people.
Give the creators of this educational learning app some respect. Sure you can't control the takeoff. But you can control the landing!
As an aviation enthusiast myself, sure I do wish that I could have at least tried to take off myself. But it don't matter as long as I still get to fly the shuttle and I'm happy. Thanks for the game / educational app.
I thought I could fly a space shuttle instead I learned about history. DONT BUY.

reviews.review_title: Really cool but could be better
reviews.review_description:
It was really fun and educational to play this. Landing the shuttle was really cool but very difficult to control properly. 
This game could be waaaaay better if it were more interactive but I still enjoyed it.

I loved everything about it . With the Quest Oculus 2 goggle I felt like I was sitting in on the Launch pad. It felt so real! I love the landing challenges they give you also. The Chatter communication was great as well as the theme music I absolutely felt the experience! My only suggestion to make the sim even more enjoyable for expert users and amateurs,  you need to add the reentry to landing phase of flight for those who want to know what its like to reenter the earths atmosphere all the way to touchdown. That would be amazing.  It could be hands on or the computer can fly it all the way . Thank you ,and I hope the would consider that.
I want my money back this is a horrible app
Waste of $9 for real. You better off going on YouTube and finding the same type of VR experience ‼️‼️‼️ Lucky I can’t rate this zero stars.

reviews.review_title: I wish I had read other reviews
reviews.review_description: Not a simulator . This is recordings of the space shuttle launches . Yes you can look at pictures . Not fly or land .

As an airline pilot I thought this was pretty awesome! Would like to see some new features on future releases. Be able to interact with primary switches, maybe control SRB separation or have aborts for landing.  Really enjoyed the sim so far, nice work
not worth the price
